query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'projects', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaireAnswersV3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireAnswersV3
UNION ALL SELECT 'questionnaireProgressV3', COUNT(*) FROM questionnaireProgressV3
UNION ALL SELECT 'briefings', COUNT(*) FROM briefings
UNION ALL SELECT 'actionPlans', COUNT(*) FROM actionPlans
UNION ALL SELECT 'riskMatrix', COUNT(*) FROM riskMatrix
UNION ALL SELECT 'onboardingProgress', COUNT(*) FROM onboardingProgress;
